skills.name: quickstart
skills.description: Cold-start a new Faber package: create, check, build, run, and test from zero context.

skills.name: language-syntax
skills.description: Faber grammar, types, semantics, and reference routing. Do not invent syntax.

skills.name: packages
skills.description: Faber package layout, manifests, imports, dependencies, and lockfiles.

skills.name: build-run
skills.description: Build, run, format, explain, and script workflows for Faber packages.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Faber test patterns, assertions, and verification workflow.

skills.name: diagnostics
skills.description: Stable Faber diagnostic codes, meanings, causes, and repair workflows.

skills.name: effects
skills.description: Faber `ad` routes, runtime builtins, native host, and the five provider families.

skills.name: targets
skills.description: Faber target capability dimensions: parse/check, emit, validate, build, run, package.

skills.name: libraries
skills.description: External Faber library resolution: Norma, Triga, Cista.

skills.name: fmir
skills.description: Advanced Faber executable package and runtime path (FMIR). Not the public release name.
